title: General Manager
description:
Panasonic

Enriching Lives Through

INNOVATION & TECHNOLOGY

Going beyond just providing good products, we at Panasonic are firmly entrenched in the brief of delivering ideas that will have a profound impact on people’s lives around the world. At the forefront of this endeavor is ensuring that our ideas are allied with the relentless pursuit of reaching new heights of excellence when it comes to pushing the boundaries of innovation. This allows us to focus on enriching the present and enhancing the future for societies throughout the globe.

We invite enthusiastic and dedicated individuals to join us as:

General Manager

Responsibilities:

1.    Bridge the technological gap between advanced products and customer needs.
2.    Modify control software of the autonomous mobile robot “HOSPI” to customers' purposes.
3.    Develop additional functions for management software of RMF for customers.
4.    Apply the latest innovations to improve RMF performance. 5.    Support the Sales Department in promotion PoC (Proof of Concept)of the autonomous mobile robot.
6.     Integrate RMF into customers' environment with applying the designated local functions.

Requirements:

1.    At least Bachelor's Degree or above in Engineering, Robotics, Software Development, or related field.
2.    Proficient in C/C++ and good in Python.
3.    Experience of ROS2 development.
4.     Business-level Japanese proficiency is required (JLPT N1 or equivalent), as the role involves regular communication with the Japan headquarters and translation of documents between Japanese and English.
5.     Familiarity with Japanese corporate operations and business practices.
6.     Prior experience in engaging with Japanese clients and stakeholders
7.     At least 5 years experiences in one or more of the following:-
·       robotics or software development of autonomous mobile robots or AGVs.
·      software development of database software or system software using GitHub
7.    Able to understand robotics and robotics development.
8.    Able to produce specification sheet of software or of software code.
9.     Strong leadership skill.  Experience in project management is a plus.
10. High Level Japanese communication skill
11. Excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills.
12. Self-driven, collaborative, and outcome-oriented team player.

Please visit the company website to apply by submitting a complete resume and academic transcripts by 10th February 2026, giving full details of your background, experience, career objectives, current and expected salaries, contact number(s) together with a recent non-returnable photograph to:

PANASONIC R&DCENTER SINGAPORE

202 Bedok South Avenue 1 #02-11Singapore 469332

Website:  https://research.sg.panasonic.com/

(Weregret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.)
